title: Fix Daily Dashboard date selector to default to today's actual date

requirements.text: Fix the Daily Dashboard date initialization so that when the page loads, the selected date state is set to today's actual current date (using `new Date()` or equivalent), and the date selector/calendar input correctly reflects and displays today's true date. Ensure that navigating to the dashboard without a pre-selected date always defaults to the current calendar date, not a hardcoded or stale value.

quotes: Please also look at the calendar to change date, make that correct not showing true date which is Today date.

acceptanceCriteria: On initial load of the Daily Dashboard, the date selector displays today's actual current date.
The date state is initialized using the real current date (e.g., `new Date()` at component mount), not a hardcoded or previously stored stale date.
The calendar/date picker input value reflects today's date in the correct format (YYYY-MM-DD or locale equivalent).
If the user navigates away and returns to the Dashboard without a specific date parameter, today's date is shown again.
Switching dates via the date selector still works correctly after the fix.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not alter backend logic or data models.
nonGoals: Changing the overall design or layout of the Daily Dashboard.
Adding new date-related features beyond fixing the default date initialization.
Modifying the History page or Food Upload page.
